subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was indeed a rare epistle, concise in expression yet comprehensive in meaning, a compendium of virtues [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما نامه بدیعی بود بلفظ مختصر و بمعنی مفصل فهرست اخلاق
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God
